LanguageData.Mono-AP.label: Mono-bodkin
LanguageData.Mono-AP.description: Mono-sharpened bodkin arrows that can penetrate thick armor.
LanguageData.Mono-Heavy.label: Mono-broadhead
LanguageData.Mono-Heavy.description: Mono-sharpened broadhead arrows that have less penetrative power, but will cause more damage when they can penetrate.
